title: When Husbands Flirt
actors: Dorothy Revier, Forrest Stanley, Tom Ricketts
plot: Newlywed lawyer Henry Gilbert lends his car to his partner, Wilbur Belcher, while he works late one night on a case for Percy Snodgrass' Purity League. Wilbur, a gay old blade, goes joyriding with Charlotte Germaine, an old sweeth...
